anti_capture_rules: No trading or commerce loop may hide risk, losses, or externalized harm.
Profit cannot override standing, challenge, safety, or commons return.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for commerce/trading seed research only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A commerce/trading seed is production-grade only when risk limits, audit trail, drawdown rules, and commons return are explicit.

canon_conditions: The loop produces audited value without hiding risk or weakening the commons.
compost_conditions: The loop depends on unverified alpha claims, hidden leverage, or socialized losses.

strongest_objections: The loop may chase extraction and short-term gain instead of compounding intelligence.

failure_conditions: Returns cannot be audited or risk bounds are missing.
claim.scope: A bounded commerce or trading seed that can fund SAB-aligned intelligence without extraction.
success_conditions: The loop produces audited value, bounded risk, and defined commons return.
claim.text: This commerce/trading seed can help SAB fund itself while preserving risk truth and public-good return.

commons_return.minimum_return: A defined share of learning, tools, or proceeds supports open SAB infrastructure and verification.

title: Commerce Trading Seed Template
